name: Andouille Sausage
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds boneless pork butt, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, toss the pork with all remaining ingredients together.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
3. Remove from refrigerator and pass through meat grinder with half-inch die attachment.
4. Remove half of the meat and pass through the grinder again.
5. Stuff sausage into one-inch casings.
6. Tie casings at four-inch intervals to form individual links.
7. Form remaining mixture into 4-ounce patties.
Yield: 5 pounds
